name: Block Sandbox
author: Poki
description: Block Sandbox is a thrilling 2D sandbox game where you create and customize your own world! Place pixelated heroes, arm them with powerful weapons and sturdy armor, and design elaborate structures from endless building blocks. Craft towering castles, bustling towns, or chaotic battlefields—the choice is yours. Progress through limitless creations and unleash your imagination. Can you build the ultimate sandbox world? How do I play Block Sandbox? Use your mouse to select the different pieces and characters and place them in your sandbox! Who created Block Sandbox? Block Sandbox is created by WeLoPlay. Play their other games on Poki: Anime Dress Up , Beauty Salon , Brainrot Clicker , Fruit Wheel , Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover , Hockey Stars , My Cozy Home , Nails DIY: Manicure Master , Star Blogger: Left or Right , Stickman Race , Stickman Bike , Tag , Tag 2 , wall-jumper, How can I play Block Sandbox for free? You can play Block Sandbox for free on Poki. Can I play Block Sandbox on mobile devices and desktop? Block Sandbox can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
